zh.Cottered, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾可特雷德
zh.Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德
zh.lifeSummary: William Eliot於大約1450年出生在英國賀特福爾。他於大約1503年與Elizabeth Wilson在英國賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年之前在英國賀特福爾可特雷德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Eliot于大约1450年出生在英国賀特福爾。他于大约1503年与Elizabeth Wilson在英国賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1529年之前在英国賀特福爾可特雷德。

nameMeanings.name: Eliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Elliott  .

History: Andrew Eliot, a shoemaker of East Coker, Somerset, England, who emigrated to Boston, MA, in 1670, was the founder of a distinguished American family which included the poet T. S. Eliot (1888–1965), who was born in St. Louis, MO. The earliest Eliot recorded in North America was John Eliot (1604–90), a Puritan missionary known as the ‘Indian Apostle’, who was born in Hertfordshire and sailed to Boston in 1631. He later settled in Roxbury, MA.

variants.name: Elliott
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: William Eliot was born about 1450, in Hertfordshire, England. He married Elizabeth Wilson about 1503, in Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 1529, in Cottered, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Eliot est né environ 1450, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wilson environ 1503, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1529, à Cottered, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Eliot wurde um 1450 in Hertfordshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1503 in Hertfordshire, England Elizabeth Wilson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1529 in Cottered, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: William Eliot è nato il circa 1450 nel Hertfordshire, England. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wilson circa 1503, nel Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1529, nel Cottered, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Cottered, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアコッテレド
ja.Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイア
ja.Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Engla: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォード
ja.lifeSummary: William Eliotは約1450年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた。約1503年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでElizabeth Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年以前にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアコッテレドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Eliot(은)는 대략 1450년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1503년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 이전 영국 허트퍼드실르 컷레드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Eliot nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wilson aproximadamente 1503, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1529, em Cottered, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Eliot родился около 1450 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wilson около 1503 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1529 г. в местности коттиред, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William Eliot nació aproximadamente 1450, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Elizabeth Wilson aproximadamente 1503, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1529, en Cottered, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
